tasks.subject: Task 1: Add tablet breakpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `tablet: '820px'` to `tailwind.config.ts` so the `tablet:` responsive prefix works in all subsequent tasks.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tailwind.config.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `theme.extend.screens` has `tablet: '820px'`
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tailwind.config.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["theme.extend.screens has tablet: '820px'", "npm run build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Fix iOS zoom and touch targets on global UI components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prevent Safari iOS auto-zoom on inputs/selects and ensure all interactive elements meet Apple HIG 44px touch target at the tablet breakpoint.

**Files:**
- Modify: `client/src/components/ui/button.tsx`
- Modify: `client/src/components/ui/input.tsx`
- Modify: `client/src/components/ui/select.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All Button size variants have `tablet:min-h-11`
- [ ] Input base className has `tablet:text-base tablet:min-h-11`
- [ ] SelectTrigger base className has `tablet:text-base tablet:min-h-11`
- [ ] Desktop appearance unchanged

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0; DevTools at 820px shows buttons/inputs ≥44px and font-size 16px

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/components/ui/button.tsx", "client/src/components/ui/input.tsx", "client/src/components/ui/select.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Button size variants have tablet:min-h-11", "Input has tablet:text-base tablet:min-h-11", "SelectTrigger has tablet:text-base tablet:min-h-11", "Desktop appearance unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Fix Audit Trail header button overflow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prevent the Refresh and Export buttons in the Audit Trail header from overflowing on iPad portrait.

**Files:**
- Modify: `client/src/pages/audit.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Header button group div has `flex-wrap`
- [ ] At 820px, both buttons are fully visible
- [ ] At 1280px, buttons remain on single row

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → Audit Trail at 820px DevTools → buttons visible, no overflow

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/audit.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Header button group has flex-wrap", "Buttons visible at 820px", "Single row at 1280px"]}
```
